description:
I'm Rob Hamilton. 🇦🇺 Motorcycles, cars, adventure, and art are what give me the FEELZ. ⚡

I started off as an automotive electrician turned professional musician and photographer. Now I'm a full-time video creator and Global Ambassador of Insta360, living out my dreams.

Between filming, editing, camping, and traveling on two wheels and four, I've also been slowly building Feelz Garage and sim racing.

My life's been pretty crazy. Maybe it's because I'm a little crazy.

Always moving. Always pushing. Always learning, exploring, and trying to better myself. Always in awe of life's magic. Always honored to be of service. Always grateful and mind-blown that I get to be myself and do what I love. 

Join me on our shared journey. Feel free to subscribe!

description:
Dr. Lali, at your service! I'm a motorcycle loving scientist. 🤓🏍️ Here to teach, entertain, and ride! 

▼ON YOUTUBE▼
I am a creator and motovlogger (riding an MT07 named Spicy Boi), and sharing tips that help other motorcycle enthusiasts & new riders. I want to educate and help you discover that motorcycles are fun, and riding can become a sport you can enjoy for a lifetime.

▼MORE ABOUT ME▼
I'm an overall nerd who likes to ride and I have a PhD in biomedical science to REALLY immortalize my nerd status. I really love birds and have a pet cockatiel named Duchess. I was born and lived in Romania (salut!) and now live in the US. My mission statement is to be excellent to myself and others, to never stop learning, and to share my passions and inspire others to share theirs.

▼WEBSITE▼
https://www.lalirides.com

▼SOCIALS▼
https://www.instagram.com/anti_parallali/
https://www.threads.net/@anti_parallali
https://www.facebook.com/anti.parallali/

description:

My mission is simple: to make riding and motorcycle maintenance feel easy and accessible for everyone. Join our supportive community as we conquer the road together! Grateful for 19k subscribers! ❤️

description:
During some rare downtime on shift, an idea was hatched in the Ambulance between crew mates, and you've stumbled on the result. 
I'm a Female Paramedic who after falling in love with Motorcycle riding am embarking as a moto traveller, with zero experience, on a trial and error search for Rest Day peace. 

The middle aged crisis is real, and often results in  "Where am I,  Who am I, and What am I doing?" moments, so you may enjoy this stripped back, no frills, honest account where I try to learn from my mistakes.  😏

Rest Days for those in the Ambulance Service are valued, so feel free to follow as I search for peace, quiet and to recharge the batteries, while trying not to die in the process.

Facebook / Insta - Rest Day Rider

#restdayrider #bikerchick #bikersofinstagram #ladybikers #insta360onex2 #quadlock #motorcyclecamping #motovlog #womanrider #moto #motorcycletravel #bikelife #cfmoto #lonerider #cfmoto450mt #hondashadow #bobber

description:
We are Cruise and Thuong, an American and Vietnamese international couple. Our common language is Japanese since we met each other and got married in Japan. 

We make videos about cycling, including bike ride vlogs, bike touring, travel by bike in different countries, bike reviews, bike shop tours, and more.

We upload at least 1 new video each week on Sundays at 9am Eastern US time.

description:
Get up close and personal in these Ride-Along Sessions with Cookie. 

See and experience the techniques as they’re used and explained. 

An interactive series with a mixture of sports...windsurf, skiing, snowboarding, kitesurfing, SUP'ing, biking, and many more! 
Tuition and exciting videos filmed daily in Greece after lockdown Summer 2020, and snowsports filmed in the French Alpes through the years! 

Like, comment and subscribe so you don't miss out on new content coming regularly! 

Join the Facebook Coaching community with Cookie....
https://www.facebook.com/groups/cookiecoaching/

Who am I? 
I am windsurf instructor, coach and trainer for Starboard Dream Team, Point-7 Sails, and International skier for ESF, Whitedot Skis, also supported by Sun God, FlyMount. 
Fully qualified in both snowsports and watersports. 

Don't forget to follow @cookatue on Instagram for daily updates, and cookiesports.co.uk for some more background on me!

description:
Hi! I am Anne Gumiran - an advocate, visual storyteller, Molchanovs Wave 2 freediver and Advance Open Water certified scuba diver. I initially started The Queen's Escape travel blog to tell people a thousandfold stories about my motherland - that Philippines is more than just its pristine beaches and breathtaking summits. Now, I’m repurposing these stories into short form videos to virtually take my audience to these beautiful places. 

Travel guides here:
https://www.thequeensescape.com

Let's get stoked! Follow my adventures here:
INSTAGRAM: www.instagram.com/annegumiran/
FACEBOOK: www.facebook.com/TheQueensEscapeph/
TIKTOK: www.tiktok.com/@annegumiran:
TWITTER: www.twitter.com/annegumiran/
